tools.name: calculate_chargeable_weight
tools.description:
Calculates chargeable (billable) weight -- frachtpflichtiges Gewicht, Frachtgewicht -- for a freight shipment (Stückgut or Sammelgut) from a list of cargo pieces, for one of four transport modes. Answers questions like "wie viel wiegt die Sendung frachtpflichtig" or "was ist das Volumengewicht".

Fo

tools.name: resolve_quantities
tools.description:
Resolves an ordered quantity of a Library article into concrete packed units (boxes/pallets), using that article's own logged packing history -- never a generic guess.

Check resolution_status first: "resolved" means units/tier are a real answer, safe to use directly. "ambiguous" means the article h

tools.name: create_article_profile
tools.description:
Creates a new article in your team's kubik.tools Library -- team-scoped from creation, visible to the whole team immediately (not a personal draft).

Two-step by design, never a silent write: call once WITHOUT confirm to get a preview of exactly what would be created (including a check for an existi

tools.name: log_pack_observation
tools.description: Logs a real, observed consolidation pack -- "these articles, at these quantities, actually packed onto N pallets at these dims/weight" -- against an existing consolidation group in your team's Library. This is ground truth: it becomes a new data point resolve_quantities and the app's own resolve flo

tools.name: undo_change
tools.description:
Undoes a create_article_profile or log_pack_observation call, but only within 15 minutes of when it was confirmed, and only if nothing else now depends on it.

For article_profiles: refuses if any packed_forms, consolidation_group_members, or edit-history rows now reference the article (edit it or d

tools.name: calculate_loading_metres
tools.description: Calculates loading metres (Lademeter, LDM) -- the floor-space unit (Ladefläche) that governs European road freight -- for a list of cargo pieces, plus the equivalent number of pallet places (Palettenstellplätze, Stellplätze). Answers questions like "wie viele Lademeter" or "wieviel Platz brauche ich

tools.name: check_truck_fit
tools.description: Checks whether a list of cargo pieces fits a named vehicle by loading metres (Lademeter, LDM, Stellplätze) and, if weight is given, by payload (Zuladung, Nutzlast) too -- the two capacity limits that actually govern road freight ("passt das auf..."), not full 3D placement or Ladungssicherung (load s

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "resolve_quantities" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "create_article_profile" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.detail: Description of "calculate_loading_metres" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "calculate_chargeable_weight" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Calculates chargeable (billable) weight for a freight shipment from a list of cargo pieces, for one of four transport modes.

For each mode, chargeable weight is the greater of the actual (scale) weight and the volumetric weight, where volumetric weight is derived from total volume using a mode-spec" → after: "Calculates chargeable (billable) weight -- frachtpflichtiges Gewicht, Frachtgewicht -- for a freight shipment (Stückgut or Sammelgut) from a list of cargo pieces, for one of four transport modes. Answers questions like "wie viel wiegt die Sendung frachtpflichtig" or "was ist das Volumengewicht".

Fo"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
